sections.paragraph:
verb לבחון

to examine, test, assay, probe, scan

verb להיבחן

be examined, tested, assayed, probed, scanned

verb להבחין

to notice, observe; distinguish, discern

masculine noun בוחן

examination, test, trial, check

adverb

gracefully, beautifully, beauteously, graciously

masculine noun

examination, test
